free_text: Study of residual nuclide yields from 0.1, 0.2, 0.6,
and 2.6 GeV proton-irradiated thin nat-Hg targets
- Fe targets. Entry superseded, see O1727
A 10.5 mm diameter discs manufactured by pressing fine-
dispersed Hg-O powder.  The weight contents of
impurities in the samples do not exceed 0.16%, of which
0.01% Ba.  The total content of the rest 60 elements,
found by the spark mass-spectrometry, is below 0.02%.
Parameters of experimental samples and monitors:
LAHET, CEM95, CEM2K, CASCADE, INUCL and YIELDX
Two independent proton beams from the
ITEP U-2 synchrotron are used to irradiate the sample,
namely, the low-energy, 70-200 MeV, and high-energy,
The errors in the independent and cumulative yields of
the reaction products for separate gamma-lines, were
determined using the error transfer formulas.
